findings.evidence: `rg -n "ncard_primesOver_eq_natCard_iff_of_isGaloisGroup|deprecated" code/TauCeti/NumberTheory/DedekindDomain/RamificationInertia.lean` shows only the current declaration at line 32 and no deprecated wrapper; the PR diff removes the explicit `hP` parameter.
findings.fix: Introduce the prime-level theorem under a new name, and keep the old signature as a `@[deprecated <newName> (since := "YYYY-MM-DD")]` wrapper that ignores `hP` and calls the replacement.
findings.issue: Public theorem `TauCeti.DedekindDomain.ncard_primesOver_eq_natCard_iff_of_isGaloisGroup` was restated from `(P : Ideal A) [P.IsMaximal] (hP : P ≠ ⊥)` to `(P : Ideal A) [P.IsPrime]`, breaking existing positional uses with no compatibility alias.

summary: The bump adaptation silently changes a public theorem’s callable API by removing an explicit hypothesis argument and changing its instance requirement, with no deprecation path for existing downstream calls.
